are_you_ok.title: Air Quality Alert Issued for West Virginia
are_you_ok.summary: Air quality alert for WV from wildfire smoke — affects broad local population, breathing/health. Groups with the Canadian smoke cluster.

you_should_know.title: City of Huntington’s $2.1 million contract with Flock Safety draws mixed reaction from officials
you_should_know.summary: Huntington's $2.1M surveillance contract drawing mixed official reaction — institutional/political-institutional story landing locally; walk in aware, don't raise.
